scripts.dist: yarn build:addon && electron-builder build && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Delete :NSAppleEventsUsageDescription' dist/mac-arm64/dock-switch.app/Contents/Info.plist >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Add :NSAppleEventsUsageDescription string dock-switch needs automation permission to focus and place application windows.' dist/mac-arm64/dock-switch.app/Contents/Info.plist && killall -9 dock-switch || true; rm -rf /Applications/dock-switch.app && cp -rf dist/mac-arm64/dock-switch.app /Applications/ && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Delete :NSAppleEventsUsageDescription' /Applications/dock-switch.app/Contents/Info.plist >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Add :NSAppleEventsUsageDescription string dock-switch needs automation permission to focus and place application windows.' /Applications/dock-switch.app/Contents/Info.plist && open /Applications/dock-switch.app
scripts.dist:signed: yarn build:addon && CSC_NAME='Developer ID Application' electron-builder --mac dir
